source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Calculate the power dissipated by the 5-volt zener diode for the following values of motor current, assuming the battery voltage remains constant at 12 volts, as shown in the figure. Given \( I_\text{motor} = 20 \, mA \), the zener power \( P_\text{zener} \) is ______mW.

answer_type is numeric, suggesting a calculation-based problem rather than direct recognition
